page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p-redis.13xlarge is a KVM-hypervised server instance belonging to the ecs.re6p family. It features 52 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor using the x86_64 architecture. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 52 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource sharing at the thread level. The system is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 3.69 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps. The hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution and a balanced memory-to-core ratio, such as in-memory caching, database nodes, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p-redis.13xlarge is an x86_64 server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. It features 52 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, providing 52 vCPUs with no hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, yielding 3.69 GB of memory per core, and operates on a KVM hypervisor. It does not include local storage or GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. This resource configuration is optimized for workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory density, such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p-redis.13xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 52 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 192 GB of RAM, and a 12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPUs.

tagline: A dedicated 52-core Intel Xeon instance with 192 GB RAM and 12 Gbps network bandwidth for compute and caching workloads.

192.0 GB of system memory providing 3.69 GB of RAM per core.
KVM hypervisor architecture with dedicated CPU allocation.
Zero local storage and no integrated GPU resources.
Suited for in-memory caching, database deployments, and general-purpose enterprise workloads.
